children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: assert 400 == 201
 +  where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
An RTP is sent through CBI API

AssertionError: assert 201 == 400
 +  where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code
Cannot send RTP with an amount over the POSTE limit
Cannot send RTP with expired date

AssertionError: Expected 201 but got 409
assert 409 == 201
 +  where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code
Happy path: a debt position is created and published in DEV environment
Happy path: a debt position is deleted in DEV environment
Happy path: a debt position is updated in DEV environment
